purpose: Maps every Systems Lab section to primary 3D model asset, secondary poster references, source areas, flashcard/SRS alignment, and manual test expectations.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 0, 1, 7; Maintenance Training Manual Aircraft General 5-12
entries.training_focus: Aircraft overview, exits, QRH structure, limitations and general operating context
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D overview loads first; reference posters are only opened from secondary reference controls.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 100 Chapter 1
entries.training_focus: Manual structure, ATA chapter/section/subject numbering, test definitions
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D placeholder board loads first; text explains ATA structure.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual Figures 6-1 to 6-4; POH/AFM Section 1/6 aircraft general references
entries.training_focus: Aircraft dimensions, jig point, aircraft stations and five-area inspection/build layout
entries.manual_test_expectation: Aircraft Dimensions & Layout GLB loads first. Pins 1-4 correspond to Figure 6-1, Figure 6-2, Figure 6-3 and Figure 6-4 reference PNGs.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 20
entries.training_focus: Standard practices, servicing, general maintenance mental model
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 25
entries.training_focus: Cabin equipment, furnishing locations, safety equipment
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D cabin/equipment placeholder loads first; oxygen/poster reference secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 51-57; POH/AFM Section 7
entries.training_focus: Fuselage, wing, empennage, stations, structural zones
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D structure placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 2; flashcards performance_limits_core
entries.training_focus: Limits, power, speed, configuration and mandatory operating constraints
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D performance/limits board loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 71/72; POH/AFM Section 7; PT6 training manual
entries.training_focus: PT6A-27 airflow, compressor, combustion, turbine, accessory gearbox, operating limits
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real PT6 cutaway GLB loads first; engine posters are secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 70
entries.training_focus: Engine standard practices, inspection and maintenance context
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D engine-practices placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 72; PT6 training manual
entries.training_focus: Engine core components and operating indications
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D engine placeholder loads first until replaced by a dedicated engine GLB.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 74; POH/AFM start procedures
entries.training_focus: Ignition, start light-off and failed-start mental model
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D ignition placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 80; POH/AFM normal/abnormal starts
entries.training_focus: Starter-generator, start sequence, hot/hung/no-light-up starts
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D starting placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 61; POH/AFM Section 7
entries.training_focus: CSU, overspeed governor, beta/reverse, feather forces, autofeather bridge
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real propeller hub GLB loads first; CSU/beta posters are secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 28; POH/AFM Section 7
entries.training_focus: Tanks, cells, boost pumps, crossfeed, wing tanks, fuel low/transfer failures
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D fuel placeholder loads first; PNG fuel schematics are secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 7; FCTM electrical section
entries.training_focus: 28 VDC buses, starter-generators, battery, bus tie, inverter/AC supplies
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D electrical placeholder loads first; electrical poster secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual hydraulic references; POH/AFM Section 7
entries.training_focus: Hydraulic power pack, hand pump, pressure, brakes, flaps, steering, ski loads
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real hydraulic pack GLB loads first; hydraulic posters secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 7; flashcards flight_controls_core/advanced
entries.training_focus: Cable/pulley controls, flaps, servo tabs, trim tabs, FEI tab, stall vane logic
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D flight-controls placeholder loads first; flap poster secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM supplements for float operations; Maintenance Training Manual Aircraft General
entries.training_focus: Float configuration, water handling context, landing gear comparison
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real float gear GLB loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual Aircraft General / landing gear references
entries.training_focus: Fixed tricycle gear, brakes, steering, nosewheel, tires and oleo context
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real wheels gear GLB loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Supplement 10; Maintenance Training Manual Aircraft General
entries.training_focus: Ski configuration and hydraulic/ski operation context
entries.manual_test_expectation: Real ski GLB loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 9 supplements/operator avionics supplements
entries.training_focus: G950/legacy avionics as installed, power supply and cockpit-state links
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D avionics placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM procedures, CAS libraries, QRH bindings
entries.training_focus: CAS/caution light logic, system-to-QRH routing and failure recognition
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D indication/alerting placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 26; POH/AFM emergency procedures
entries.training_focus: Fire detector probes, extinguisher bottle, shutdown/isolation sequence
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D fire-protection placeholder loads first; detector poster secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM icing procedures; Maintenance Training Manual air systems
entries.training_focus: Boots, intake deflectors, windshield/side window heat and icing restrictions
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D ice/rain placeholder loads first; posters secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 75
entries.training_focus: Bleed air, pneumatic services and compressor bleed context
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D air-systems placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 77; POH/AFM limitations
entries.training_focus: Torque, T5/ITT, NG, NP, oil pressure and failure cues
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D engine-indication placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 78
entries.training_focus: Exhaust path, hot section awareness and fire/heat context
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D exhaust placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 79; POH/AFM engine limitations
entries.training_focus: Oil tank, pump, cooler, filter, chip detector, prop oil and torque sensing
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D oil placeholder loads first; oil posters secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 76; POH/AFM normal procedures
entries.training_focus: Power, prop and fuel lever control paths and operating effects
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D engine-controls placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual ATA 73; PT6 training manual
entries.training_focus: Engine-driven pump, FCU, governor pressures, fuel heater and metering
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D engine-fuel-control placeholder loads first; engine fuel posters secondary.

entries.primary_source_area: Maintenance Training Manual air conditioning/air systems; POH/AFM Section 7
entries.training_focus: Cabin heat/ventilation, bleed-air heat exchanger and duct overheat awareness
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D air-conditioning placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 7; Maintenance Training Manual air systems
entries.training_focus: Environmental/bleed/cabin airflow and unpressurised aircraft context
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D environmental placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 5; performance calculator assets
entries.training_focus: Power-setting, V-speeds, density altitude, configuration and performance mental model
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D performance board placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM Section 4/10; QRH procedures
entries.training_focus: Takeoff/climb/cruise/descent/landing technique and QRH decision windows
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D operations-technique placeholder loads first.

entries.primary_source_area: POH/AFM emergency procedures; Maintenance Training Manual equipment/furnishings
entries.training_focus: Extinguishers, oxygen, exits, ELT/survival-equipment awareness as installed
entries.manual_test_expectation: 3D emergency-equipment placeholder loads first; oxygen poster secondary.
